general.about: I use data to make fulfillment easier and faster, helping Samsara's customers keep the world of physical operations safe, efficient, and sustainable.

items.heading: Supply Chain Analyst at Samsara
items.description: Learning about hardware sourcing/manufacturing and generative-AI-enabled data analysis through special projects.
items.title: Supply Chain Analyst

items.heading: Operations Intern at Samsara
items.description: Created spreadsheet models driving improvements to shipping costs and order fulfillment.
items.title: Operations Intern

items.heading: Project Management Intern at Starbucks
items.description: Coded an interactive calendar app giving a 450-person organization visibility into how their work flows.
items.title: Project Management Intern

items.heading: Program Management Intern at Fiveable
items.description: Built resources that helped people work better by streamlining processes and reducing costs across a large organization.
items.title: Program Management Intern

items.heading: Leadership Development Intern at Foster School of Business
items.description: Created this internship and improved curriculum that doubled course completion rates in the first year.
items.title: Leadership Development Intern

items.heading: InReach
items.description: Designed, prototyped, and pitched a CRM app for my introductory informatics class.
items.title: inreach

items.heading: Houserules
items.description: Led the ideation + design of a mobile app that tracks appliance use for shared households.
items.title: Houserules

items.heading: Vice President at Delta Sigma Pi (Sigma Upsilon Chapter)
items.description: Led recruiting efforts for DSP, a professional fraternity facilitating professional development & community building.
items.title: Senior VP

items.heading: Founding Member at UW Project/Product/Program Management Association
items.description: Co-founded a community of students interested in careers within product, program, and project management.
items.title: Founding Member

items.heading: Vice President, Husky Run Club
items.description: Raised $9000 for UW's recreational distance running club. Also managed spending/fundraising, and record-keeping.
items.title: VP

items.heading: Essentials/Sharing/Advanced Badges from Notion
items.description: Certified in all Notion features/use cases, including databases, permissions, and formulas.
items.name: Essentials/Sharing/Advanced Badges

items.heading: Project Management, Courses 1-5 from Coursera
items.description: Completed Courses 1-5 of Google's PM Certification.
items.name: Project Management, Courses 1-5

items.heading: BA, Business at University of Washington
items.description:
Took a year off school to travel and work. 

Led my professional business fraternity and the distance running club.

Sometimes went to class, always made time for coffee.
